description:
Demonstrates the 'append' action which concatenates text to existing string fields.

The append action supports two modes:
1. String data with jsonPath selector targeting a string field
2. Object data where each string property is appended to the corresponding field in the target object

This is useful for extending descriptions, adding disclaimers, or appending notes without replacing the original text.

patches.data: **Note:** This API requires authentication via OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow.

data.description: **Deprecation Notice:** This endpoint will be removed in v2. Use getConstellationByIAUCode instead.
